summary: Tested Case Structuring drills UI reordering feature. Found critical bug: Frontend displays WRONG difficulty labels and time limits. Sorting logic works correctly but badge display uses hardcoded DIFFICULTY_CONFIG instead of API data.

critical.issue: Badge displays wrong difficulty label - uses DIFFICULTY_CONFIG[drill.difficulty].label instead of drill.difficulty_label from API
critical.details: Backend sends difficulty_label='Easy' for advanced drills, but frontend shows 'Hard' because it uses DIFFICULTY_CONFIG['advanced'].label

critical.issue: Time display shows wrong duration - uses DIFFICULTY_CONFIG[drill.difficulty].time instead of drill.time_limit from API
critical.details: Backend sends time_limit=300 (5 min) for advanced drills, but frontend shows '15 min' because it uses DIFFICULTY_CONFIG['advanced'].time

action_items: Fix DrillsPage.jsx line 392: Change {diffConfig.time} to format drill.time_limit (e.g., Math.floor(drill.time_limit/60) + ' min')
Update DIFFICULTY_CONFIG to use difficulty_label for badge styling lookup instead of difficulty field
critical_code_review_comments: The sorting logic at lines 193-210 is CORRECT - it sorts by drill.difficulty_label (Easy→Medium→Hard)
The bug is in the badge rendering at lines 349, 387-393 which uses DIFFICULTY_CONFIG[drill.difficulty] instead of API data
Backend has swapped labels: advanced='Easy', beginner='Medium', intermediate='Hard'
Frontend DIFFICULTY_CONFIG has original labels: beginner='Easy', intermediate='Medium', advanced='Hard'
This mismatch causes drills to display with wrong labels despite correct sorting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Structuring drills sorting logic works correctly (sorts by difficulty_label from API). The bug is in badge display - frontend uses hardcoded DIFFICULTY_CONFIG instead of API data. After fix, verify: 1) Easy drills (1-8) show green 'Easy' badge with '5 min', 2) Medium drills (9-14) show yellow 'Medium' badge with '10 min', 3) Hard drills (15-20) show rose 'Hard' badge with '15 min'

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Mismatch between backend difficulty_labels mapping and frontend DIFFICULTY_CONFIG. Backend swapped labels (advanced='Easy', beginner='Medium', intermediate='Hard') but frontend still uses original mapping (beginner='Easy', intermediate='Medium', advanced='Hard'). Frontend renders badges using DIFFICULTY_CONFIG[drill.difficulty] instead of drill.difficulty_label from API.
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe drills 1-8 show 'Hard' badge with '15 min' (should be 'Easy' with '5 min')
5. Observe drills 9-14 show 'Easy' badge with '5 min' (should be 'Medium' with '10 min')
6. Observe drills 15-20 show 'Medium' badge with '10 min' (should be 'Hard' with '15 min')
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Update DrillsPage.jsx to use drill.difficulty_label for badge text and drill.time_limit for time display instead of DIFFICULTY_CONFIG lookup

drill_sorting.evidence: Drills are sorted by difficulty_label: cs-a-* (Easy) first, cs-b-* (Medium) second, cs-i-* (Hard) last

drill_numbering.evidence: Drills are numbered 1-20 sequentially based on sorted order

badge_display.evidence: Badge shows wrong label - 'Hard' for Easy drills, 'Easy' for Medium drills, 'Medium' for Hard drills

time_display.evidence: Time shows wrong duration - '15 min' for 5 min drills, '5 min' for 10 min drills, '10 min' for 15 min drills
